text:
Nongshim's Seafood Ramyun preferred choice seafood noodle lovers everywhere.
made with perfect blend spices vegetables, bringing world best-tasting seafood noodle.
soup base vegetable into microwavable bowl, then noodles top.
Place microwavable cover bowl.
Heat minutes room temperature water, minutes with water.
Noodles: Wheat Flour, Potato Starch, Palm Oil, Salt, Condiment (Soup, Maltodextrin, Anchovies, Shrimp, Fish Sauce (Tuna, Bream), Sauce)), Acidity Regulators: E501, E339, E500, Liquid Tocopherol (Antioxidant E306, Emulsifier E322 (Contains Soybean)), Green Extract (Oligosaccharides, Catechin, Acidity Regulator E330), Pigment E101.
Soup Powder: Seasoning (Cuttlefish, Maltodextrin, Hydrolyzed Vegetable Protein (Soy, Corn), Clams, Shrimps, Salt, Yeast Extract, Crab, Wheat Starch, Anchovies, Clams, Tuna)), Salt, Spices (Pepper, Maltodextrin, Rice Bran Oil, Black Pepper), Sugar, Flavour Enhancers E621, E631, Glucose, Anticaking E551, Caramel Powder (Maltodextrin, Coloring E150c), Acidity Regulator E330.
Flakes: Carrot, Fishcake (Cod, Potato Starch, Wheat Starch), Seaweed, Green Onion, Mushroom.
